LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IAN BIRCHALL DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 3RD, 4TH, 7TH, 8TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION. FACTS SUFFICIENTLY PLED TO SUPPORT ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS WHICH WILL BE THE SUBJECT OF DISCOVERY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT WHICH IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION BUT RATHER A PRINCIPLE UNDERLYING CERTAIN DOCTRINES AND REMEDIES. SEE JOGANI VS. SUPERIOR COURT (2008) 165 CAL.APP. 4TH 901, 911. ALTHOUGH MOTION TO STRIKE NOT PROPERLY SEPARATELY NOTICED (CRC 3.1322), MOTION GRANTED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ATTORNEYS FEES FOR PLAINTIFFS TO SPECIFY WHICH DEFENDANTS THEY ARE SEEKING FEES FROM AND WHAT BASIS; AND TO ALLEGE FACTS AMOUNTING TO FRAUDULENT, OPPRESSIVE, AND MALICIOUS CONDUCT.
